news.title:
Navin Fluorine disclosed loss of share certificates under SEBI regulations, published in Financial Express.
Shareholders can lodge claims within 15 days to KFIN Technologies for duplicate certificates.
news.summary:
Navin Fluorine disclosed loss of share certificates under SEBI regulations, published in Financial Express.
Shareholders can lodge claims within 15 days to KFIN Technologies for duplicate certificates.

news.title:
India's ISM 2.0 boosts semiconductor ecosystem, benefiting chemical firms like Gujarat Fluorochemicals and Navin Fluorine.
Stocks such as Archean Chemicals, Neogen Chemicals, and Tata Chemicals see opportunities in semiconductor-related materials.
news.summary:
India's ISM 2.0 boosts semiconductor ecosystem, benefiting chemical firms like Gujarat Fluorochemicals and Navin Fluorine.
Stocks such as Archean Chemicals, Neogen Chemicals, and Tata Chemicals see opportunities in semiconductor-related materials.

news.title:
18 BSE 500 firms surpass FY25 revenue, EBITDA, net profit in 9 months.
Finance and capex-focused companies lead performance surge amid volatility.
news.summary:
18 BSE 500 firms surpass FY25 revenue, EBITDA, net profit in 9 months.
Finance and capex-focused companies lead performance surge amid volatility.

news.title:
Navin Fluorine's promoters released 1.5M pledged shares with SBI.
All pledged shares, held by Mafatlal Impex, are now fully released.
news.summary:
Navin Fluorine's promoters released 1.5M pledged shares with SBI.
All pledged shares, held by Mafatlal Impex, are now fully released.

news.title:
Navin Fluorine's Rs 1,400 crore capex drives transformation into high-margin custom chemical manufacturing, expanding revenue and EBITDA margins to 34.5% in Q3 FY26.
Key growth areas include climate-friendly refrigerants, agrochemical supply, oncology-focused CDMO, and data centre cooling; execution risks remain despite premium valuations.
news.summary:
Navin Fluorine's Rs 1,400 crore capex drives transformation into high-margin custom chemical manufacturing, expanding revenue and EBITDA margins to 34.5% in Q3 FY26.
Key growth areas include climate-friendly refrigerants, agrochemical supply, oncology-focused CDMO, and data centre cooling; execution risks remain despite premium valuations.

news.title:
Jefferies assigns buy rating to Navin Fluorine with a target of ₹7,800/share, citing strong HFC volume growth.
Navin Fluorine expected to post 20% revenue CAGR, 30% EBITDA margin for FY26-FY28 driven by data center cooling solutions.
news.summary:
Jefferies assigns buy rating to Navin Fluorine with a target of ₹7,800/share, citing strong HFC volume growth.
Navin Fluorine expected to post 20% revenue CAGR, 30% EBITDA margin for FY26-FY28 driven by data center cooling solutions.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley maintains Underweight on SRF, Navin Fluorine due to refrigerant price pressure.
Refrigerant prices may drop 25%; EPS impact estimated at 8-13% with mixed analyst sentiment on both stocks.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley maintains Underweight on SRF, Navin Fluorine due to refrigerant price pressure.
Refrigerant prices may drop 25%; EPS impact estimated at 8-13% with mixed analyst sentiment on both stocks.

news.title:
US tariff reduction from 50% to 18% under the 2026 trade deal boosts Indian chemical exports, valued at $5.7B in FY24.
Beneficiaries include Aarti Industries, SRF, UPL, Aether Industries, and Navin Fluorine, all reporting significant YoY revenue growth.
news.summary:
US tariff reduction from 50% to 18% under the 2026 trade deal boosts Indian chemical exports, valued at $5.7B in FY24.
Beneficiaries include Aarti Industries, SRF, UPL, Aether Industries, and Navin Fluorine, all reporting significant YoY revenue growth.

news.title:
Navin Fluorine to host analyst and investor meet on Feb 18, 2026, focusing on Q3FY26 financials.
Highlights include 47% YoY revenue growth, 109% YoY EBITDA rise, and key capex updates for future expansion.
news.summary:
Navin Fluorine to host analyst and investor meet on Feb 18, 2026, focusing on Q3FY26 financials.
Highlights include 47% YoY revenue growth, 109% YoY EBITDA rise, and key capex updates for future expansion.

news.title: Citi maintains a Sell rating on Navin Fluorine with a target price of 5,550.
news.summary: Citi maintains a Sell rating on Navin Fluorine with a target price of 5,550.

news.title:
Navin Fluorine's Q3 EBITDA surged to ₹3.07B from ₹1.47B YoY.
EBITDA margin improved significantly to 34.4% from 24.3% YoY.
news.summary:
Navin Fluorine's Q3 EBITDA surged to ₹3.07B from ₹1.47B YoY.
EBITDA margin improved significantly to 34.4% from 24.3% YoY.

news.title:
India-US trade deal cuts tariffs on Indian chemical exports to 18% from 50%, boosting competitiveness.
Stocks to watch: Aarti Industries, Navin Fluorine, Gujarat Fluorochemicals, Laxmi Organic, Vinati Organics, SRF Ltd.
news.summary:
India-US trade deal cuts tariffs on Indian chemical exports to 18% from 50%, boosting competitiveness.
Stocks to watch: Aarti Industries, Navin Fluorine, Gujarat Fluorochemicals, Laxmi Organic, Vinati Organics, SRF Ltd.

news.title:
Navin Fluorine starts commercial production of 40,000 TPA hydrofluoric acid at Dahej.
The facility was set up with an investment of ₹450 crores.
news.summary:
Navin Fluorine starts commercial production of 40,000 TPA hydrofluoric acid at Dahej.
The facility was set up with an investment of ₹450 crores.

news.title:
Navin Fluorine announces an investor meet on Feb 11, 2026, at Nuvama India Conference in physical mode.
Q2FY26 results: Sales up 46% YoY to Rs. 758.4 Cr; EBITDA margin improves to 32.5%, up 1176 bps YoY.
news.summary:
Navin Fluorine announces an investor meet on Feb 11, 2026, at Nuvama India Conference in physical mode.
Q2FY26 results: Sales up 46% YoY to Rs. 758.4 Cr; EBITDA margin improves to 32.5%, up 1176 bps YoY.

news.title:
Navin Fluorine Intl Ltd hits an all-time high at Rs.6443, showcasing strong growth.
The milestone highlights robust performance in the specialty chemicals sector.
news.summary:
Navin Fluorine Intl Ltd hits an all-time high at Rs.6443, showcasing strong growth.
The milestone highlights robust performance in the specialty chemicals sector.

news.title:
US cuts tariffs on Indian exports to 18% from 50%, benefiting SRF, Navin Fluorine, and Neogen Chemicals.
HPCL, Reliance, and ONGC focus on crude sourcing; Reliance may secure discounts, while ONGC awaits $500M dividends.
news.summary:
US cuts tariffs on Indian exports to 18% from 50%, benefiting SRF, Navin Fluorine, and Neogen Chemicals.
HPCL, Reliance, and ONGC focus on crude sourcing; Reliance may secure discounts, while ONGC awaits $500M dividends.

news.title:
Jefferies identifies Adani Group as key beneficiary of India-US trade deal due to US exposure.
Other gainers include Sona BLW, Bharat Forge, Navin Fluorine, PI Industries, SRF, and Welspun Living.
news.summary:
Jefferies identifies Adani Group as key beneficiary of India-US trade deal due to US exposure.
Other gainers include Sona BLW, Bharat Forge, Navin Fluorine, PI Industries, SRF, and Welspun Living.

news.title:
Navin Fluorine saw an NSE block trade of ~34,099 shares at Rs. 6,115.
The total trade value amounted to Rs. 20.85 crores.
news.summary:
Navin Fluorine saw an NSE block trade of ~34,099 shares at Rs. 6,115.
The total trade value amounted to Rs. 20.85 crores.

news.title:
Navin Fluorine begins commercial production at Phase 1 of cGMP 4 plant in Dewas.
Successful batch validation completed by a European partner; updates on company site.
news.summary:
Navin Fluorine begins commercial production at Phase 1 of cGMP 4 plant in Dewas.
Successful batch validation completed by a European partner; updates on company site.

news.title:
Navin Fluorine's board will meet on Feb 9, 2026, to review unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.
Trading window for company securities will remain closed from Dec 31, 2025, to Feb 11, 2026.
news.summary:
Navin Fluorine's board will meet on Feb 9, 2026, to review unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.
Trading window for company securities will remain closed from Dec 31, 2025, to Feb 11, 2026.
